title: Scope Open PR observation failures
goal: Make Open-PR guard observation failures resource-scoped so one broken repository observation blocks only overlapping writes instead of pausing unrelated repositories.

metadata.source_review: Follow-up from PR #177 open-PR claim guard review.
metadata.safety_boundary: Fail closed for the affected resource; do not turn observation failures into implicit allow decisions.

acceptance.assertion: An observation failure carries enough repository/resource context to synthesize blockers only for overlapping claims.
Tests cover two git repositories where one observation fails and a non-overlapping repo-write task remains eligible.
frontier and explain-next identify the affected repository/resource and failure class without exposing secrets.
